member.name: M:MyApi.Controllers.AdminUsersController.GetAll(MyApi.Dtos.AdminUserQueryDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns admin users with optional filters.
member.param: Supported filters: id for exact match, phone for partial phone match, username for partial username match, email for partial email match, status for exact status match, and limit to cap the number of returned rows.
member.returns: A filtered list of admin users.

member.name: M:MyApi.Controllers.AdminUsersController.GetByQuery(MyApi.Dtos.AdminUserQueryDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns admin users using query string filters.
member.param: Supported filters: id, phone, username, email, status, roleId, roleCode, createdFrom, createdTo, updatedFrom, updatedTo, and limit.

member.name: M:MyApi.Controllers.AdminUsersController.GetById(System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns one admin user by id.

member.name: M:MyApi.Controllers.AdminUsersController.Create(MyApi.Dtos.CreateAdminUserDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Creates a new admin user.

member.name: M:MyApi.Controllers.AdminUsersController.Update(System.Int32,MyApi.Dtos.UpdateAdminUserDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Updates an existing admin user.

member.name: M:MyApi.Controllers.AdminUsersController.UpdateByQuery(MyApi.Dtos.AdminUserQueryDto,MyApi.Dtos.UpdateAdminUserDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Updates one admin user selected by query string filters.
member.param: The query filters. They must match exactly one admin user.

member.name: M:MyApi.Controllers.AdminUsersController.Delete(System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Deletes an admin user by id.

member.name: M:MyApi.Controllers.AdminUsersController.DeleteByQuery(MyApi.Dtos.AdminUserQueryDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Deletes one admin user selected by query string filters.
member.param: The query filters. They must match exactly one admin user.

member.name: M:MyApi.Controllers.AuditLogsController.GetAll(MyApi.Dtos.AuditLogQueryDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns audit logs with filtering and pagination.

member.name: M:MyApi.Controllers.AuditLogsController.GetById(System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns one audit log with the full request and response payloads.

member.name: M:MyApi.Controllers.AuditLogsController.GetMetrics(MyApi.Dtos.AuditLogQueryDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns summary metrics for the audit log dashboard.

member.name: M:MyApi.Controllers.PackagesController.GetAll(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns all packages.

member.name: M:MyApi.Controllers.PackagesController.GetById(System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns one package by id.

member.name: M:MyApi.Controllers.PackagesController.Create(MyApi.Dtos.CreatePackageDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Creates a new package.

member.name: M:MyApi.Controllers.PackagesController.Update(System.Int32,MyApi.Dtos.UpdatePackageDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Updates an existing package.

member.name: M:MyApi.Controllers.PackagesController.Delete(System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Deletes a package by id.

member.name: M:MyApi.Controllers.LibraryFinancialController.GetMySummary(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns the financial summary for the current library account.

member.name: M:MyApi.Controllers.LibraryFinancialController.GetMyStatement(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns the financial statement for the current library account.

member.name: M:MyApi.Controllers.AdminQrCodesController.GetLibraryMetrics(System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns QR metrics for one library for admin dashboard usage.

member.name: M:MyApi.Controllers.AdminQrCodesController.GetLibraryItems(System.Int32,System.Nullable{MyApi.Models.RecordStatus},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns QR records for one library for admin dashboard usage.

member.name: M:MyApi.Controllers.AdminQrCodesController.GetByReference(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns full QR export details by reference code for admin usage.
member.param: The QR reference code to search for.

member.name: M:MyApi.Controllers.QrCodesController.GetAll(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns QR exports created for the current library.

member.name: M:MyApi.Controllers.QrCodesController.GetById(System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns one QR export by id for the current library.

member.name: M:MyApi.Controllers.QrCodesController.Export(MyApi.Dtos.CreateQrCodeDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Exports a new QR code, creates a linked financial charge, and returns the reference code as plain text.

member.name: M:MyApi.Controllers.QrCodesController.Update(System.Int32,MyApi.Dtos.UpdateQrCodeDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Updates the student data and status of a QR export for the current library.

member.name: M:MyApi.Controllers.QrCodesController.Delete(System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Deletes a QR export for the current library when its linked financial charge has not been settled or paid.

member.name: P:MyApi.Dtos.AdminUserResponseDto.Id
member.summary: The unique admin user identifier.

member.name: P:MyApi.Dtos.AdminUserResponseDto.FullName
member.summary: The full display name of the admin user.

member.name: P:MyApi.Dtos.AdminUserResponseDto.Username
member.summary: The unique username used for login.

member.name: P:MyApi.Dtos.AdminUserResponseDto.Email
member.summary: The admin email address if available.

member.name: P:MyApi.Dtos.AdminUserResponseDto.PhoneNumber
member.summary: The admin phone number if available.

member.name: P:MyApi.Dtos.AdminUserResponseDto.RoleId
member.summary: The assigned role identifier.

member.name: P:MyApi.Dtos.AdminUserResponseDto.RoleName
member.summary: The assigned role name.

member.name: P:MyApi.Dtos.AdminUserResponseDto.RoleCode
member.summary: The assigned role code.

member.name: P:MyApi.Dtos.AdminUserResponseDto.Status
member.summary: The account status.

member.name: P:MyApi.Dtos.AdminUserResponseDto.LastLoginAt
member.summary: The last successful login time if available.

member.name: P:MyApi.Dtos.AdminUserResponseDto.CreatedAt
member.summary: The creation timestamp.

member.name: P:MyApi.Dtos.AdminUserResponseDto.UpdatedAt
member.summary: The last update timestamp.

member.name: P:MyApi.Dtos.CreateAdminUserDto.FullName
member.summary: The admin user's full name.

member.name: P:MyApi.Dtos.CreateAdminUserDto.Username
member.summary: The unique username for login.

member.name: P:MyApi.Dtos.CreateAdminUserDto.Email
member.summary: The unique email for the admin user.

member.name: P:MyApi.Dtos.CreateAdminUserDto.PhoneNumber
member.summary: The admin phone number.

member.name: P:MyApi.Dtos.CreateAdminUserDto.PasswordHash
member.summary: The stored password hash or password value used by the current auth flow.

member.name: P:MyApi.Dtos.CreateAdminUserDto.RoleId
member.summary: The role identifier. It must reference a role with guard name Admin.

member.name: P:MyApi.Dtos.CreateAdminUserDto.Status
member.summary: The account status.

member.name: P:MyApi.Dtos.CreateAdminUserDto.LastLoginAt
member.summary: The last login time if you want to seed it.

member.name: P:MyApi.Dtos.AdminUserQueryDto.Id
member.summary: Filter by exact admin user id.

member.name: P:MyApi.Dtos.AdminUserQueryDto.Phone
member.summary: Filter by phone number using partial match.

member.name: P:MyApi.Dtos.AdminUserQueryDto.Username
member.summary: Filter by username using partial match.

member.name: P:MyApi.Dtos.AdminUserQueryDto.Email
member.summary: Filter by email using partial match.

member.name: P:MyApi.Dtos.AdminUserQueryDto.Status
member.summary: Filter by exact account status.

member.name: P:MyApi.Dtos.AdminUserQueryDto.RoleId
member.summary: Filter by exact role id.

member.name: P:MyApi.Dtos.AdminUserQueryDto.RoleCode
member.summary: Filter by role code using partial match.

member.name: P:MyApi.Dtos.AdminUserQueryDto.CreatedFrom
member.summary: Filter by created date from this UTC datetime.

member.name: P:MyApi.Dtos.AdminUserQueryDto.CreatedTo
member.summary: Filter by created date until this UTC datetime.

member.name: P:MyApi.Dtos.AdminUserQueryDto.UpdatedFrom
member.summary: Filter by updated date from this UTC datetime.

member.name: P:MyApi.Dtos.AdminUserQueryDto.UpdatedTo
member.summary: Filter by updated date until this UTC datetime.

member.name: P:MyApi.Dtos.AdminUserQueryDto.Limit
member.summary: Maximum number of records to return. Default is 50 and maximum is 200.

member.name: P:MyApi.Dtos.PackageResponseDto.Id
member.summary: The unique package identifier.

member.name: P:MyApi.Dtos.PackageResponseDto.PackageCode
member.summary: The unique package code.

member.name: P:MyApi.Dtos.PackageResponseDto.Name
member.summary: The package name shown to admins and clients.

member.summary: The package price in Iraqi dinars.

member.name: P:MyApi.Dtos.PackageResponseDto.Status
member.summary: The current package status.

member.summary: The admin user id who created this package.

member.summary: The username of the admin who created this package.

member.summary: The package creation timestamp.

member.summary: The package last update timestamp.

member.summary: The library code. It must match the current logged-in library.

member.summary: The POS code belonging to the current library.

member.summary: Total generated QR codes for the library.
